_comment: TRACKED TEMPLATE — committed, contains NO Sprout Lands files. The REAL manifest is generated locally (gitignored) at licensed_assets/sprout_lands/sprout_active_manifest.json by tools/art/sprout_integrate.py. Keys are art ids relative to res://art/ (the same keys the generated placeholders use). Values are paths relative to licensed_assets/sprout_lands/normalized/ (or a full res:// path). ArtActivation resolves licensed -> redistributable -> generated -> missing, so an absent manifest just falls back to the cozy generated art. Categories below show what CAN be mapped once the premium pack is installed; the example values are illustrative only.
license: Premium — local only, non-redistributable, credit Cup Nooble (see docs/licensed_asset_policy.md)
